multilinguals.name: MedicationAdministration.identifier
multilinguals.description: Identifikator für die Medikationsverabreichung

multilinguals.shortDescription: The administration was entered in error and therefore nullified.
multilinguals.name: Entered in Error
multilinguals.description: The administration was entered in error and therefore nullified.

multilinguals.shortDescription: Includes administrations by the patient in their home (this would include long term care or nursing homes, hospices, etc.)
multilinguals.name: Community
multilinguals.description: Includes administrations by the patient in their home (this would include long term care or nursing homes, hospices, etc.)

multilinguals.shortDescription: No reason known.
multilinguals.name: None
multilinguals.description: No reason known.

multilinguals.shortDescription: Zusätzliche Informationen zur Medikationsverabreichung als Freitext.
multilinguals.name: MedicationAdministration.note
multilinguals.description: Zusätzliche Informationen zur Medikationsverabreichung als Freitext.

multilinguals.shortDescription:
Free text dosage can be used for cases where the dosage administered is too complex to code. When coded dosage is present, the free text dosage may still be present for display to humans.

The dosage instructions should reflect the dosage of the medication that was administered.
multilinguals.name: MedicationAdministration.dosage.text
multilinguals.description:
Free text dosage can be used for cases where the dosage administered is too complex to code. When coded dosage is present, the free text dosage may still be present for display to humans.

The dosage instructions should reflect the dosage of the medication that was administered.

multilinguals.shortDescription: The preferred system is UCUM, but SNOMED CT can also be used (for customary units) or ISO 4217 for currency. The context of use may additionally require a code from a particular system.

multilinguals.description: The preferred system is UCUM, but SNOMED CT can also be used (for customary units) or ISO 4217 for currency. The context of use may additionally require a code from a particular system.

multilinguals.shortDescription: Das Datum, an dem der Medikationseintrag von der Informationsquelle bestätigt wurde.

multilinguals.shortDescription: Identifikator für den Medikationseintrag
multilinguals.name: MedicationStatement.identifier
multilinguals.description: Identifikator für den Medikationseintrag

multilinguals.shortDescription: All actions that are implied by the prescription have occurred.
multilinguals.name: Completed
multilinguals.description: All actions that are implied by the prescription have occurred.

multilinguals.shortDescription: Includes orders for medications to be administered or consumed in an outpatient setting (for example, Emergency Department, Outpatient Clinic, Outpatient Surgery, Doctor's office)
multilinguals.name: Outpatient
multilinguals.description: Includes orders for medications to be administered or consumed in an outpatient setting (for example, Emergency Department, Outpatient Clinic, Outpatient Surgery, Doctor's office)

multilinguals.shortDescription: Zusätzliche Informationen zum Medikationseintrag als Freitext.
multilinguals.name: MedicationStatement.note
multilinguals.description: Zusätzliche Informationen zum Medikationseintrag als Freitext.

multilinguals.shortDescription:
Indicates order in which dosage instructions should be applied or interpreted.

If sequence number of multiple Dosages is the same > instructions treated as concurrent. If sequence number is different > Dosages be sequential.

32 bit number; for values larger than this, use decimal
multilinguals.name: MedicationStatement.dosage.sequence
multilinguals.description:
Indicates order in which dosage instructions should be applied or interpreted.

If sequence number of multiple Dosages is the same > instructions treated as concurrent. If sequence number is different > Dosages be sequential.

32 bit number; for values larger than this, use decimal

multilinguals.shortDescription:
Event occurs frequency times per period

Indicates the duration of time over which repetitions are to occur; e.g. to express "3 times per day", 3 would be the frequency and "1 day" would be the period. If periodMax is present, this element indicates the lower bound of the allowed range of the period length.
multilinguals.name: MedicationStatement.dosage.timing.repeat.period
multilinguals.description:
Event occurs frequency times per period

Indicates the duration of time over which repetitions are to occur; e.g. to express "3 times per day", 3 would be the frequency and "1 day" would be the period. If periodMax is present, this element indicates the lower bound of the allowed range of the period length.

multilinguals.shortDescription: The value of the measured amount. The value includes an implicit precision in the presentation of the value.
multilinguals.name: MedicationStatement.dosage.doseAndRate.dose[x]:doseQuantity.value
multilinguals.description: The value of the measured amount. The value includes an implicit precision in the presentation of the value.

multilinguals.description: A human-readable form of the unit.
